requiredOptions.acceptTarget: EventTarget-like object exposing addEventListener and removeEventListener
requiredOptions.editTarget: EventTarget-like object exposing addEventListener and removeEventListener
requiredOptions.readPendingPreview: function returning { nativeResult, context, ambiguity?, source? }

returnShape.dispose: idempotent function removing both target listeners through existing wiring disposal

authorizedFlow: validate acceptTarget and editTarget as EventTarget-like injected objects
validate readPendingPreview and optional notification callbacks
create an injected surface implementing subscribeAccept, subscribeEdit, and readPendingPreview
subscribeAccept must add exactly one listener to acceptTarget
subscribeEdit must add exactly one listener to editTarget
each unsubscribe must remove the exact listener it added
accept event must flow to confirmed persistence through existing wiring
edit event must produce zero persistence calls and zero store writes
dispose must remove both listeners exactly once
no document lookup, selector lookup, window access, or backend creation is permitted
requiredTests: subscribe exactly one accept listener and one edit listener
use click as the default event name
forward accept events to the existing wiring
prove accept persists through the existing confirmed adapter chain
prove edit performs zero store writes and zero store reads
remove the exact listeners on dispose
prove events after dispose have no effect
prove no window, document, querySelector, getElementById, or localStorage access exists
prove no engine, generic bridge, backend creation, or quote-truth logic is introduced
forbiddenChanges: any runtime source file other than the two allowed files
promotion of PDF extraction to official quote truth

dependencyContract.targetPolicy: accept and edit targets must be injected explicitly
dependencyContract.lookupPolicy: surface binding must not discover or query DOM elements
dependencyContract.storePolicy: store is forwarded to existing wiring; no backend creation
